basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting 1 Project Associate-I with Bachelor’s/Master’s degree qualification. Last date to apply is 08 July 2026.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 35 years as on last date of application
qualification.education_qualification: Four years Bachelor’s Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / Master’s Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / BVSc / B.Pharm or Bachelor’s degree in Engineering/Technology/Medicine or equivalent

salary_details.details: Consolidated Monthly Remuneration (including HRA): | ₹ 37,000/- + HRA (for NET/GATE qualified scholars) ₹ 30,000/- + HRA (for others) HRA @ 30% (₹11,100/- or ₹9,000/- respectively)

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications based on eligibility and credentials followed by Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
how_to_apply: Visit the official application portal: Apply here
Register / Login and fill the online application form with all required details.
Upload necessary documents including educational certificates, CV, experience proof (if any), and other relevant files.
Submit the application before the deadline: 08 July 2026.
Keep a printout or copy of the submitted application for future reference.
For Upcoming Opportunities: Candidates are advised to regularly visit the IIT Gandhinagar recruitment portal for future Project Associate, JRF, and other research staff vacancies.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary. Higher remuneration is applicable for candidates qualified in national level exams (NET/GATE). For queries, contact: Prof. Sharad Gupta at [email protected] The Institute reserves the right to select or reject candidates as per project needs.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar has invited applications for the temporary position of Project Associate-I under the project on Alzheimer’s Disease. The position is for one year and extendable. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. Download IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting 1 Project Associate-I with Bachelor’s/Master’s degree qualification. Last date to apply is 08 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Four years Bachelor’s Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / Master’s Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / BVSc / B.Pharm or Bachelor’s degree in Engineering/Technology/Medicine or equivalent
Prior relevant experience with peptide synthesis and protein/peptide biophysical characterization methods. Good communication skills.
35 years as on last date of application

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Remuneration
content_sections.text: Consolidated Monthly Remuneration (including HRA): ₹ 37,000/- + HRA (for NET/GATE qualified scholars) ₹ 30,000/- + HRA (for others) HRA @ 30% (₹11,100/- or ₹9,000/- respectively)

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting of applications based on eligibility and credentials followed by Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official application portal: Apply here Register / Login and fill the online application form with all required details. Upload necessary documents including educational certificates, CV, experience proof (if any), and other relevant files. Submit the application before the deadline: 08 July 2026. Keep a printout or copy of the submitted application for future reference. For Upcoming Opportunities: Candidates are advised to regularly visit the IIT Gandhinagar recruitment portal for future Project Associate, JRF, and other research staff vacancies.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary. Higher remuneration is applicable for candidates qualified in national level exams (NET/GATE). For queries, contact: Prof. Sharad Gupta at [email protected] The Institute reserves the right to select or reject candidates as per project needs.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 (One) vacancy for Project Associate-I.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for application submission is 08 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Associate-I at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: ₹37,000/- + HRA for NET/GATE qualified candidates and ₹30,000/- + HRA for others.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate position?
faq.answer: Four years Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Natural/Agricultural Sciences, Engineering, Technology or equivalent.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for this Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years as on the last date of application.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate vacancy?
faq.answer: Through the online portal: http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/

faq.question: Q7. Is NET/GATE qualification mandatory for higher pay in this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with NET/GATE or equivalent national exam qualification get higher remuneration.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project title for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: Mapping Pathogenic PostTranslational Modifications on Tau in Alzheimer’s Disease.

faq.question: Q9. What experience is desirable for this Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Experience in peptide synthesis and protein/peptide biophysical characterization methods.

faq.question: Q10. Are there upcoming research vacancies at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Yes, regularly check the official recruitment portal for future Project Associate, JRF, and other positions.
